# DOSSIER — ANDRÉ CHAPERON

> **Versão:** v1.0.0
> **Criado:** 2026-03-17
> **Fonte:** Modern Marketing System (MMS)

---

## IDENTIDADE

**Nome:** André Chaperon
**Nacionalidade:** Sul-Africano (baseado em Europa)
**Área:** Email Marketing, Systems-Based Marketing, Sphere of Influence
**Co-criador:** Shawn Twing (parceiro no MMS)

---

## CONTRIBUIÇÃO PRINCIPAL

André Chaperon é o arquiteto de uma filosofia de marketing fundamentalmente oposta ao mainstream de resposta direta. Onde Dan Kennedy e seus discípulos aplicam "blunt force trauma" — urgência agressiva, last chance emails, buy-now-or-die — André constrói **mundos narrativos** onde as pessoas querem estar.

Suas criações principais:
1. **Autoresponder Madness (ARM)** — Revolucionou email marketing com story-powered sequences
2. **Sphere of Influence (SOI)** — Framework de aquisição de clientes via presell sites e content ecosystem
3. **Modern Marketing System (MMS)** — Currículo completo integrando Systems Theory + AoE + SOI + TTE + TDB

---

## FRAMEWORKS-CHAVE

### 1. Art of Email (AoE)
Complete email lifecycle: RBS → VNL → Bridge → SOS/STP/PLS → COS
- **RBS:** 3-7 emails, zero selling, pure rapport
- **VNL:** Weekly heartbeat of value
- **Bridge:** Permission-seeking transition to promotion
- **SOS:** 5-7 story-driven emails building emotional investment
- **PLS:** 3-5 emails with urgency escalation
- **COS:** Post-purchase onboarding

### 2. Sphere of Influence (SOI)
Interconnected world of Presell Sites + Email + Content
- Multiple "doors" (Presell Sites) into one world
- Chain of Beliefs mapped for each audience
- 50+ contextually relevant outbound links per PS
- Character arcs for prospect transformation

### 3. Value Proposition Design Canvas (VPDC)
Audience (Jobs+Pains+Gains) × Product (Pain Relievers+Gain Creators)
- JTBD with functional, social, emotional dimensions
- Select top 1-3 in each category
- Create strategic messaging brief

### 4. The Durable Business (TDB)
Discover → Validate → Build → Optimize
- Writing as validation tool
- Project X for minimum viable experiments
- Data-driven optimization loops

### 5. Momentum Builder
6-Week Sprint: Strategy → Ads → Landing Pages → RBS → Promos → Polish

## POSICIONAMENTO NO ECOSSISTEMA

**Complementa:** Todd Brown (belief marketing), Russell Brunson (funnel strategy)
**Contrasta:** Dan Kennedy (aggressive DR), hard closers
**Área Única:** Ninguém mais ensina SOI (Presell Site worlds) com essa profundidade
**Peso sugerido para CARGO agents:**
- CMO: 0.85 (email, content, SOI)
- CRO: 0.80 (offers, VPDC, conversion via relationship)
- Copywriter: 0.90 (writing frameworks, email copy)
- Media Buyer: 0.70 (TTE, paid+organic hybrid)
